name: Player Birthday
description: Birthday celebration post for current squad members. Light-hearted, personal content that humanizes players and drives fan interaction.

birthday_message.example: Wishing our number 7 a fantastic birthday! Sve najbolje!

guidelines: Use a smiling or candid player photo. Add subtle birthday decorations (confetti, cake icon, balloons) in club colors — blue and white only, no generic party colors. Include the player's age and name prominently. Encourage fans to leave birthday wishes in comments. Use Croatian birthday greeting 'Sretan rođendan'.
